text.title: Process Mining & Automation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does event log have case_id + activity + timestamp?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: Is the data window within 90 days?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run discovery, ranking, and feasibility scoring; produce full report.

example.trace: log_integrity=true → window=2025-10-01 to 2026-04-30 → run mining; produced 12 ranked variants with 4 high-feasibility candidates.
